title: Ceph OSD 관리
description: Ceph OSD 관리 documents osd material for Ceph in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the storage-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Disk 준비, Raw device를 사용하는 경우, Logical VolumeLV를 사용하는 경우, Data 흐름, and OSD 추가하기, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include osd, ceph osd 관리, infrastructure, and storage, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / storage / ceph / osd / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
